title: Immersive Vanilla: Weapons and Tools
description: Hint of Realism in Vanilla Style Weapons and Tools
body:
# Immersive Vanilla: Weapons and Tools Alpha 2.5 NeoForged 
![Header Image ](https://github.com/MiscArtist/Immersive-Vanilla-Weapons-and-Tools/blob/main/assets/images/iv-wt-alpha-2-header.jpg?raw=true)

> Version Info: **Alpha** 2.5 (Updated 5th September 2024)

> Minecraft: **1.21 Java**

> Join My discord server for early access!

> CurseForge: [Download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/immersive-vanilla-weapons-and-tools-vanilla-de)

## Important
- This pack requires the **[NeoForged](https://neoforged.net/)** mod loader! Please install it if you don't have it already!
  
- As mentioned above, it **WILL NOT work** with **Forge**, **Fabric** and **Vanilla** Minecraft. (for info regarding fabric please see end of the page). Also support for Forge is planned to come out soon! When it does, I'll make sure to link it here.
  
- This pack **contains only** replacement for **All Swords** and **Diamond Axe** as for now since this is the alpha and experimental release!
  
## What is new in Alpha 2.5?
1. **New texture work** for sword.
2. Support for **all swords**.
3. **Fixed models** (some "_see-through_" parts now gone)﻿
4. **New art** work
5. Storage **size improvement**
6. [Github Repository](https://github.com/MiscArtist/Immersive-Vanilla-Weapons-and-Tools/)
7. Minor bug fixes
##

Hello Minecraft! With this pack, you can view a realistic side of minecraft with the art style it still being close to vanilla. The models are a bit high detailed and thus the name: Immersive Vanilla. I present this with hopes that you will like this creation.

I know that some people do not prefer realism in minecraft and I'm completely ok with that. Minecraft is not supposed to be realistic. Thus I'm considering to put it in the category of "experimental". If you get the signs, I'm saying that this pack might not be perfect and may have some minor defects. I'm expecting feedbacks from y'all.

#

### Developer Message:
The models in this pack are .obj instead of .json files. Since .json files restrict to some limitations of mordern 3-dimensional modeling.

if you're intrested in how I did this, simply contact me on my discord @miscmusician

##

### Contact :

For mod developers at Fabric, I need your help for making this available for Fabric as well! Please contact me if you would like to help.

~made with love,
steve

## 

> Next update expected: Not Soon :( (Alpha release 3)

With Alpha 3.0, we will have full axe support with better models and textures! Stay tuned <3
